weapons.name: Rubber Duck
weapons.description: The classic debugging companion. Surprisingly pointy.

weapons.name: Stack Trace
weapons.description: A sharp printout of exactly where things went wrong.

weapons.name: // TODO Dagger
weapons.description: A passive-aggressive reminder that cuts deep.

weapons.name: Regex Sword
weapons.description: Powerful but unpredictable. Even the wielder isn't sure what it matches.

weapons.name: Git Bisect Blade
weapons.description: Cuts the problem space in half with every swing.

weapons.name: Design Doc
weapons.description: Heavy with forethought. Crushes problems before they start.

weapons.name: Code Review Pen
weapons.description: 'Nit: this variable name is a war crime.'

weapons.name: The Linter
weapons.description: Ruthlessly removes anything that doesn't conform.

weapons.name: Architecture Wand
weapons.description: Draws boxes and arrows. Enemies become well-structured.

weapons.name: Rewrite Hammer
weapons.description: When all else fails, rewrite from scratch.

weapons.name: PEP-8 Katana
weapons.description: Every strike follows the style guide perfectly.

weapons.name: Prototype Chain
weapons.description: Inherits damage from every object in the chain.

weapons.name: Malloc Mace
weapons.description: Allocates a devastating chunk of pain.

weapons.name: Ownership Blade
weapons.description: Can only be wielded by its rightful owner. Moves are denied to all others.

weapons.name: Goroutine Staff
weapons.description: Launches concurrent strikes that converge on a single channel.

armors.name: Try-Catch Cloak
armors.description: Wraps you in exception handling. Errors bounce off.

armors.name: Type Safety Shield
armors.description: Blocks unexpected types from hurting you.

armors.name: Docker Container
armors.description: Isolates you from the hostile environment.

armors.name: K8s Armor
armors.description: Self-healing armor. Restores 2 HP per turn.

armors.name: Monolith Plate
armors.description: Massive, tightly coupled, impossible to break.

accessories.name: AI Pair Programmer
accessories.description: An AI that autocompletes your attacks.

consumables.name: Coffee Potion
consumables.description: Hot, dark, and fixes everything temporarily.

consumables.name: Energy Drink
consumables.description: Pure liquid productivity. Side effects include jitters.

consumables.name: Pizza Slice
consumables.description: The programmer's fuel. Still warm from the Sprint Review.

consumables.name: Code Review Scroll
consumables.description: Reveals weaknesses in any codebase... or enemy.

consumables.name: Git Stash
consumables.description: Saves your current state. Can restore later.

consumables.name: Sudo Potion
consumables.description: With great power comes great restoration.

consumables.name: Rollback Scroll
consumables.description: Reverts to last known good state. One-time use.
